summary: Tested Estate Guardian AI chat enhancements. Backend APIs verified: basic chat (200 OK with context-aware responses), analyze_vault action, analyze_readiness action (with action_result containing readiness breakdown). Frontend verified: GuardianPage shows 3 action buttons, markdown rendering works (bold text), action badges and readiness cards structure in place. LIMITATION: generate_checklist action untestable due to LLM budget exceeded (litellm.BadRequestError: Budget has been exceeded).

minor.issue: LLM budget limit reached during testing - API returns 500 after budget exceeded
minor.note: This is an infrastructure/billing issue, not code bug

passed_tests: POST /api/chat/guardian with basic message - returns 200 with context-aware response referencing estate documents (1152 chars)
POST /api/chat/guardian with action='analyze_vault' - returns 200 with comprehensive vault analysis (12769 chars)
POST /api/chat/guardian with action='analyze_readiness' - returns 200 with action_result containing readiness breakdown (overall_score, documents, messages, checklist)
ChatResponse includes action_result field (correctly null for basic messages, populated for actions)
POST /api/chat/guardian with estate_id parameter - correctly fetches estate context (references Mitchell family, Penny, beneficiaries)
Estate model has 'state' field - verified via API
PATCH /api/estates/{estate_id} accepts 'state' field - successfully set to 'California'
State field persisted in database and returned in GET
Frontend Guardian page loads at /guardian URL

Frontend shows 3 action buttons: Analyze Vault (data-testid='guardian-action-analyze_vault'), Generate Checklist (data-testid='guardian-action-generate_checklist'), Analyze Readiness (data-testid='guardian-action-analyze_readiness')
Frontend renders AI markdown responses - bold text rendering verified (<strong> tags present)
Frontend shows loading state when action button clicked ('Analyzing readiness score...')
Frontend has chat input field (data-testid='guardian-input') and send button (data-testid='guardian-send-button')
Frontend shows 5 suggested questions at bottom
untested_due_to_budget: POST /api/chat/guardian with action='generate_checklist' - LLM budget exceeded before test could complete
Frontend action badge display after checklist generation (requires successful AI response)
Frontend readiness breakdown cards after readiness analysis (requires successful AI response)
action_items: Increase LLM budget or wait for budget reset to fully test generate_checklist action
Re-test action badge and readiness cards display when LLM is available
critical_code_review_comments: ESTATE_GUARDIAN_SYSTEM_PROMPT is comprehensive with state-specific estate law expertise for all 50 states
gather_estate_context() properly includes documents, beneficiaries, checklist, messages, and readiness breakdown
extract_document_text() handles PDF extraction via pdfplumber with error handling
Checklist JSON parsing in generate_checklist action properly avoids duplicates
MarkdownText component in GuardianPage.js handles bold, headers, lists rendering

success_rate.backend: 83% (5/6 API tests passed, 1 untestable due to budget)

test_credentials.otp: Get from logs: tail -n 5 /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log | grep -oP 'OTP for.*: \K\d+' | tail -1

seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded Mitchell Family Estate data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Estate Guardian AI features are implemented correctly. The LLM budget was exceeded during testing (litellm.BadRequestError: Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 1.00364245, Max budget: 1.0). When budget is reset, test: 1) generate_checklist action to verify items_added in action_result, 2) Frontend action badge display, 3) Frontend readiness breakdown cards. All other features verified working. The estate 'state' field was set to 'California' during testing.
